Arabic Bridal
A beautiful choice for brides who love minimal yet graceful henna.
Arabic bridal designs feature flowing floral patterns, leafy trails, and elegant spacing, creating a sophisticated and modern bridal look while keeping the design light and stylish.
Best For: Brides who prefer simple, classy, and elegant henna.
Package Options :
• Three Quarter Hands – 2,500/-

• From Elbow – 3,000/-
